title: Link in monday to a finder-folder (in macos)
excerpt:
Is there any chance to create a link in our monday tool which i can redirect to a folder. 
Background: We are using monday as a creative agency. In projects we are working on customer files and need to open the folders a…

posts.author: artkurat (Benjamin Sen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there any chance to create a link in our monday tool which i can redirect to a folder.

Background: We are using monday as a creative agency. In projects we are working on customer files and need to open the folders always new. If there would be a chance to just once put in the Folder-Link into monday (in an own column) it would save us some time. If i click on the link, the finder needs to open the folder i set in the link

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @artkurat,

Thanks for your feature request

Can you confirm if what you’re referring to is addressed in the existing feature request here, Link-Column with a Local Link (not Web-Link)?

If this is the case, we’d love to merge the 2 request to increase votes, and put greater emphasis on this need.

You can read more about our feature request process here: All you need to know about our feature request process!

posts.author: artkurat (Benjamin Sen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bianca,

yes it is the same I searched but didn’t find a topic similar to ours – but that’s it.

Mit kreativen Grüßen

Benjamin Sen

posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for confirming Benjamin - no worries!

posts.cookedHtml: A post was merged into an existing topic: Link-Column with a Local Link (not Web-Link)

posts.author: lashi (Lashi Bandara)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve built a monday.com app called Local and web links, specifically for this. You can open local files and folders directly without leaving monday.com.
It’s currently in beta, and you’re welcome to try it.

It will be available in the marketplace soon. We designed it to be very affordable , and its simple nature allows us to offer it at a low price.

viskode.com

Local and Web Links

posts.author: lashi (Lashi Bandara)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi our app is now available in marketplace
Local & Web Links

You can give the app a try with the free plan, it covers up to 5 users.
